tftscr_init.tooltip: Initialize ST7789 TFT screen (240x320), pins are preset: MOSI=23 SCLK=18 CS=5 DC=4 RST=19, rotation 3 (horizontal screen), 40MHz SPI, BGR color sequence

tftscr_fill_screen.tooltip: Fill the entire screen with the specified color

tftscr_draw_pixel.message0: TFT draw point X %1 Y %2 color %3
tftscr_draw_pixel.tooltip: Draw a pixel at specified coordinates

tftscr_draw_line.message0: TFT Drawing Lines X1 %1 Y1 %2 X2 %3 Y2 %4 Color %5

tftscr_draw_rect.message0: TFT Rectangle X %1 Y %2 Width %3 High %4 Color %5

tftscr_fill_rect.message0: TFT fills rectangles X %1 Y %2 Width %3 High %4 Color %5

tftscr_draw_circle.message0: TFT circle X %1 Y %2 Radius %3 Color %4

tftscr_fill_circle.message0: TFT fill circle X %1 Y %2 Radius %3 Color %4

tftscr_draw_string.message0: TFT Draws Text X %1 Y %2 Content %3
tftscr_draw_string.tooltip: Draw text at the specified location (color and size need to be set first)

tftscr_color_rgb.tooltip: Generate colors from RGB values (0-255 each)

tftscr_width.tooltip: Get the screen width (pixels, 320 for horizontal screen)

tftscr_height.tooltip: Get the screen height (pixels, 240 for horizontal screen)

tftscr_animation.tooltip: Upload GIF or MP4 and convert to TFT screen RGB565/RGB332 animation frames

tftscr_play_animation.message0: TFT plays animation X %1 Y %2 Animation %3 Mode %4
tftscr_play_animation.tooltip: Play TFT animation; non-blocking mode displays the next frame every time execution reaches the frame interval

tftscr_draw_animation_frame.message0: TFT displays animation frames X %1 Y %2 Animation %3 frames %4
tftscr_draw_animation_frame.tooltip: Displays the specified animation frame. Frame numbers outside the range will be limited to the valid range.

tftscr_animation_frame_count.message0: Get the total number of frames of TFT animation %1
tftscr_animation_frame_count.tooltip: Get the total number of frames of TFT animation

tftscr_step_animation_frame.message0: Let the frame variable %1 move one step towards the target frame %2 with the total number of frames %3 in the direction %4
tftscr_step_animation_frame.tooltip: Move the frame variable one step towards the target frame, automatically select the shortest direction or force forward/reverse direction
